# User Memory — Root Index

**User:** Desmond  
**Role:** AI engineer at a startup  
**Context window budget:** 4000 tokens  
**Generated by:** agent (template — regenerate with pipeline)

## Who this user is

Desmond is an AI engineer building agent memory infrastructure (`microbots`). He works across Slack, GitHub, Linear, Gmail, Notion, and Perplexity daily. His primary goals are building reusable memory layers for AI agents and automating triage and context management across integrations.

**Key preferences:**
- Async-first communication
- Always creates a Linear ticket before opening a GitHub PR
- Always posts to #deployments before and after every production deploy
- Code must have type hints; mypy + black enforced via pre-commit

## Navigation Layers

Each layer has its own `agents.md` — drill into whichever is relevant.

| Layer | File | Cost (tokens) | Description |
|-------|------|--------------|-------------|
| Integrations | [integrations/agents.md](integrations/agents.md) | ~600 | All 6 tools with behavioral metadata |
| Entities | [entities/agents.md](entities/agents.md) | ~700 | People, channels, repos, projects, teams |
| Chats | [chats/agents.md](chats/agents.md) | ~500 | Scraped/touched content by source |
| Memories | [memories/agents.md](memories/agents.md) | ~400 | Distilled high-signal knowledge |
| Skills | [skills/agents.md](skills/agents.md) | ~450 | Learned atomic behaviors |
| Workflows | [workflows/agents.md](workflows/agents.md) | ~350 | Multi-step processes |

## Quick-access facts

- **Infrastructure decisions** → ask Alice Chen (@alice on Slack)
- **Code reviews** → Bob Kim (@bob on GitHub, assigns to microbots + taro-api PRs)
- **Deploy convention** → post to #deployments before and after every prod deploy
- **Task tracking** → Linear ticket first, then PR, link in PR description
- **Active project** → "Agent Memory" in Linear → microbots repo on GitHub

## Graph source

All memory lives in SurrealDB. This file is a generated artifact.  
To query directly: `make db-query`
